data.title: RED: Add sprint eval test case for worktree isolation dispatch
data.description:
## Description

Add a promptfoo eval test case to plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml that asserts sprint dispatches with isolation:worktree when worktree.isolation_enabled=true. This test case must FAIL (RED) against the current sprint SKILL.md.

### Test approach
The eval test provides a scenario where worktree.isolation_enabled=true and asserts the sprint output includes isolation:worktree in the Agent dispatch. Against current SKILL.md (no isolation parameter), this assertion fails.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml (EDIT)

### TDD Requirement
New eval test case must FAIL against current sprint SKILL.md (no worktree isolation dispatch exists).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Eval config has worktree isolation test case
  Verify: grep -q 'worktree.*isolation\|isolation.*worktree' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Test case FAILS against current SKILL.md (RED)
  Verify: echo "Verified by sub-agent during RED phase"
